data.body: HANDOFF SNAPSHOT (2026-07-08). LANDED on main via Gerrit (all MERGED): 389 A1 b306, 390 A2 36d1, 407 A3 34b1 (tooling only), 408 C4 943f, 409 C1/C3 a713/acd0, 410 close-out (RC1 resurrection test + RC2b .bak-restart test + fsck resurrection-repair edge fix + doc GC link). CLOSED w/ completion signatures (5): b306, 36d1, 943f, a713, acd0. GC follow-up polite-antivirus-bedbug (536b, idea) created+linked. OPEN/REMAINING (6): 34b1 A3 (in_progress; tooling landed, needs 4 tests + no-in-flight-pass check + LIVE remediation run w/ recorded counts), c244 C2 (open; root-caused, unimplemented), a118 B1 (open; live shadow+heal), d01e D1 (open; live matrix), 9622 (open; NO plan-review), eca4 (open; NO plan-review). Recommended order: A3 -> C2 -> B1 -> D1 -> 9622 -> eca4 (eca4 last, biggest conflict surface). Live infra confirmed (JIRA env + acli + project REB); user authorized live runs. Epic stays in_progress until all 6 close.
